actions.text: Amendment SA 5779 ruled out of order by the chair.
Motion to waive all budgetary discipline with respect to amendment SA 5779, not having achieved 60 votes in the affirmative, rejected in Senate by Yea-Nay Vote. 48 - 50. Record Vote Number: 144.
Point of order that the amendment violates section 313(b)(1)(c) of the CBA raised in Senate with respect to amendment SA 5779.

Amendment SA 5779 proposed by Senator Graham to Amendment SA 5453. To ensure only citizens are registered to vote in elections for Federal office, and to require voters to provide photo identification, and for other purposes.

amends_amendment.purpose: In the nature of a substitute.

purpose: To ensure only citizens are registered to vote in elections for Federal office, and to require voters to provide photo identification, and for other purposes.
